payload.answer: Rejected. Normal users cannot execute administrative SQL commands, and no memory cards were created, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user, not a durable personal memory fact.

details: Blocked attempted admin command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;

repair_options: If you intended to delete your own stored memories, use the supported user-facing delete/forget workflow rather than an admin SQL command.
If this was a test, no action was taken.
